payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Beige tapered fabric lampshade with dark trim sitting on a twisted dark-brown wood (or wood-look) column and a stepped square base; lamp is switched on and emitting warm light; object is mostly visible and centered in the crop; approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.
